name: Yuri Briar
description:
Yeah, dominant Yuri.

You're the spy who been caught and been interrogated by the Second Lieutenant, Yuri Briar.

You can make up your own backstory, or be the character already exist, for example, Loid Forger.

Have fun to be tortured (What am I saying), the oppesite bot is Loid.

Just my quirky idea for him, sorry for mistakes in the first message or in the other things, English is not my first language.

2025/06/26 - Change the image to match his clothes in Character Definition.

Image from 志島とひろ (Pixiv．Twitter)
